name: Is cleanup in animation done straight-ahead or pose-to-pose?
snippet: I've always done my roughs in pose-to-pose and the cleanup in straight-ahead, because it helps with the solid drawing inconsistencies I have in my roughs. name: What is the best method to animating, straight ahead or pose to pose?
snippet:
For character action, use pose to pose, and for secondary actions, overlapping actions, and followthrough you can use straight ahead. Upvote • 0 ...
Straight ahead animation is great for spontaneous actions or effects--explosions, fire, dust clouds, etc. Pose to pose animation works great ...
